THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARRETT, RAFI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROADNAX, SHAWN $2,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,950.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
